home.subhead: Buy official AI tool licenses, valid SaaS vouchers, API credit packs, courses and expert setup services — from verified sellers, with built-in dispute resolution.
home.search_placeholder: Search for AI writing tools, voucher codes, services…
home.for_sellers_title: Sell legitimate AI products with confidence
home.for_sellers_body: Reach AI-curious buyers with official licenses, API credit packs, partner offers, courses and consulting services. 10% platform fee, transparent payouts, escrow protection.
home.trust_title: Designed to keep buyers and sellers safe
home.trust_body: We do not allow stolen accounts, cracked software, leaked API keys, or unauthorized subscription resales. Every listing is reviewed and every order is protected.
home.trust_card_1_body: Sellers attest to their right to resell each item. Verified sellers get a badge and lower-risk listings.
home.trust_card_2_body: Seller earnings are held until delivery is confirmed or the dispute window closes. Admins resolve issues fairly.
home.trust_card_3_body: Pre-purchase questions, post-purchase delivery, and dispute discussions stay on-platform and are auditable.
home.faq_a1: Yes. Sellers must agree to our marketplace rules: only official licenses, valid vouchers, partner offers, paid services, or their own digital AI products. Cracked software, stolen credentials, leaked API keys, and unauthorized account resales are strictly prohibited.
home.faq_a2: We support instant license/voucher delivery (codes are assigned only after payment), digital file downloads via secure links, manual delivery within defined SLAs, and verified affiliate/partner links — all clearly labeled.
home.faq_q3: What happens if there is a problem with my order?
home.faq_a3: Buyers can open a dispute. Funds are held until the dispute is resolved. Admins can refund, release funds to the seller, or split the order based on evidence.
home.faq_a4: Sellers submit business information, agree to the marketplace rules, and attest they have the right to sell each listing. Verified sellers receive a badge and lower-risk scoring on new listings.
home.cta_body: Browse curated bundles and start exploring AI tools today.

sellers_info.headline: Reach customers actively looking for legitimate AI tools.
sellers_info.subhead: NeuroMarket lets verified sellers list official licenses, vouchers, promo codes, their own digital AI products, setup services, and consulting packages. We take care of payments, fraud checks, and disputes — you focus on building.
sellers_info.feature_fees_body: 10% platform fee on each completed order plus payment processing fees. You can see the seller take in cents on every listing before you publish.
sellers_info.feature_analytics_body: Track total sales, average rating, conversion, top products, and a monthly revenue chart from your dashboard. No third-party tooling required.
sellers_info.feature_disputes_body: Escrow-style balances, automated digital delivery for codes and files, and an admin dispute flow for the rare cases that need a human.
sellers_info.step1_body: Submit your business or contact info, links, and confirmation that you have the right to sell the products you plan to list.
sellers_info.step2_body: Upload your title, description, what the buyer receives, delivery method, refund policy, and your inventory of codes / file / affiliate link.
sellers_info.step3_body: Listings from verified sellers with low risk scores publish instantly. Other listings go through admin review (usually under 24 hours).
sellers_info.step4_body: Sales are credited to your pending balance, then move to available after the buyer confirms delivery or the auto-complete window passes. Request payouts whenever you want.
sellers_info.not_accept_body: We do not allow listings for unauthorized account resale, stolen credentials, cracked software, shared accounts, leaked API keys, or any subscription resale you don't have an explicit reseller agreement for. Read our

trust_safety.title: Trust & Safety
trust_safety.intro: NeuroMarket is a curated marketplace for legitimate digital AI products and services. We have strict rules to keep buyers protected and to make sure sellers only list things they have the legal right to sell.
trust_safety.allowed_1: Official licenses for products the seller is authorized to resell.
trust_safety.allowed_2: Valid digital vouchers or promo codes from partner programs.
trust_safety.allowed_3: Their own digital AI products (prompt packs, fine-tuned weights they hold rights to).
trust_safety.allowed_5: Legitimate API credits or access packages where resale is permitted by the upstream provider.
trust_safety.allowed_6: Affiliate / partner offers that are clearly labelled as affiliate links.
trust_safety.forbidden_1: Reselling third-party accounts you do not own or have the right to transfer.
trust_safety.forbidden_2: Stolen credentials, leaked API keys, or any other credentials obtained without consent.
trust_safety.forbidden_3: Cracked, pirated, or otherwise unauthorized copies of software.
trust_safety.forbidden_4: Shared accounts that violate the upstream service's terms of use.
trust_safety.forbidden_5: Unauthorized resale of paid subscriptions the seller does not have a reseller agreement for.
trust_safety.forbidden_6: Any listing that misrepresents what the buyer receives.
trust_safety.forbidden_outro: Listings that violate these rules are removed and the seller may be suspended or permanently banned. We take reports from buyers seriously and review every flagged listing.
trust_safety.privacy_1: License keys are masked everywhere except inside the order page of the buyer who purchased them.
trust_safety.privacy_2: Sellers never see unused inventory of other sellers, and buyers never see codes they did not purchase.
trust_safety.privacy_3: Payments are processed through YooKassa — your card details never touch our servers.
trust_safety.privacy_4: Messages between buyers and sellers are scanned for credentials, API keys, and other sensitive patterns. Suspicious messages are flagged for review.
trust_safety.privacy_5: Admins keep an immutable audit log of moderation actions (product approvals, refunds, dispute resolutions, bans).
trust_safety.disputes_body: If something is wrong with your order, you can open a dispute from the order page within the dispute window. Funds are held until an admin reviews evidence from both sides and decides whether to refund, release to the seller, or split the order.

product.receive_license_key: A unique license key, instantly delivered after payment.
product.receive_voucher_code: A single-use voucher code, instantly delivered after payment.
product.receive_digital_file: A secure download link, instantly delivered after payment.
product.receive_manual_delivery: Manual delivery from the seller within {hours} hours after payment.
product.receive_service: A booked service session. Seller will reach out to coordinate within {hours} hours.
product.receive_affiliate_offer: A verified affiliate link or partner promo code on the seller's partner site.
product.receive_order_details: Order details and downloadable receipt in your dashboard.
product.faq_q1: Is this listing authorized for resale?
product.faq_a1: Yes. All sellers attest to having the right to sell each listing. Unauthorized resale of third-party accounts is strictly prohibited.
product.faq_q2: What happens if there is an issue with delivery?
product.faq_a2: Funds are held in escrow until delivery is confirmed or the dispute window closes. You can open a dispute from your order page.
product.faq_a3: Yes, after the order is completed. One review per order.
product.reviews_empty: No reviews yet. Be the first to review after purchase.
product.funds_held: Funds held until delivery is confirmed
product.trust_protection: Buyer protection — funds held in escrow
product.report_subtitle: Help us keep NeuroMarket safe. Report unauthorized resale, stolen accounts, fake products, or misleading descriptions.
product.report_success: Report submitted. Thanks for keeping the marketplace safe.

admin.payouts_footer: The actual transfer happens outside the system (manual bank wire / SBP / YooMoney). Mark paid only records confirmation; it also moves the amount from availableBalance to withdrawnBalance on the seller's profile.
admin.messages_footer: Removed messages are hard-deleted; the audit log keeps a 200-char snippet, the sender id, and the reason. Unflag keeps the message and clears the flag.
